channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBC honors John Madden on Thanksgiving by taking the original Madden Cruiser on one last trip
item.description: John Madden’s love of football and family came through the most on Thanksgiving. On Thursday, NBC will continue to honor Madden’s legacy when it opens its broadcast before the nightcap between the Miami Dolphins and Green Bay Packers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Stanford’s struggling offense under microscope ahead of finale at San Jose State
item.description: The Cardinal (3-8) rank 123rd out of 133 FBS teams in yards per game (318.9) and 111th in points (22.1).
item.dc:creator: Harold Gutmann, The Mercury News

item.title: Hall's fifth career hat trick leads Blackhawks over Stars 6-2
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Taylor Hall scored his fifth career hat trick, Connor Bedard, Teuvo Teravainen and Louis Crevier also scored, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Dallas Stars 6-2 on Wednesday night for their second win in three games. Hall’s game-opening goal 17 seconds in set the tone.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hapless Pelicans 'embarrassed' by their 'disgusting' loss to the struggling Raptors
item.description: Suffice to say Dejounte Murray enjoyed his first game in a New Orleans Pelicans uniform a lot more than his long-awaited second.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani seeks $325,000 worth of baseball cards from his ex-interpreter
item.description: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani wants his ex-interpreter Ippei Mizuhara to hand over hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of baseball cards he says were fraudulently bought using his money.
item.dc:creator: Hallie Golden, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Boise State withdraws from Mountain West volleyball tournament rather than play San Jose State
item.description: Boise State advanced to the semifinals of the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament by beating Utah State on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New York Jets hire 33rd team to assist in hiring process
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- An organizational shift is upon us for the New York Jets. Owner Woody Johnson has hired the 33rd team which was founded by former Jets GM Mike Tannenbaum in 2019, to help aid the Jets search.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: NFL could see 7-10 coaches fired after 2024 season comes to an end, analyst says
item.description: With two NFL head coaches already fired mid-season, one analyst believes that there could be 7-10 dismissed of their duties on "Black Monday" following Week 18.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Longtime SF Giant Brandon Crawford announces retirement
item.description: (KRON) -- Longtime San Francisco Giants shortstop Brandon Crawford is retiring after 14 MLB seasons, he announced Wednesday on Instagram. Crawford, 37, played his first 13 seasons with the Giants before signing with the St. Louis Cardinals in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Raiders will start O'Connell at quarterback when they visit the Chiefs
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Aidan O'Connell will start at quarterback when the Las Vegas Raiders visit their AFC West rival and two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles area grad on life support after suffering head injury in college football game
item.description: A graduate of a Los Angeles County high school is on life support after suffering a serious head injury during a college football game last month. His school had mistakenly announced he had died Tuesday. According to KTLA affiliate WHNT in Huntsville, Alabama, 20-year-old Medrick Burnett Jr.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: 20-year-old college football player dies from head injuries sustained during game
item.description: Alabama A&M redshirt freshman linebacker Medrick Burnett Jr. died at age 20 from head injuries he sustained during a game in late October.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Browns' Jameis Winston rejects mashed potatoes as a Thanksgiving dish, doesn't even want it around
item.description: Cleveland Browns quarterback Jameis Winston said mashed potatoes is a dish that he doesn't even want people to bring to Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LIV Golf will hire sports and entertainment leader Scott O'Neil to replace Greg Norman, report says
item.description: LIV Golf is hiring Scott O’Neil, former CEO of the Philadelphia 76ers and New Jersey Devils, to replace Greg Norman in running the Saudi-backed rival league about to enter its fourth season, The Athletic reported Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions coach Dan Campbell appears to shade NFL after Jameson Williams fined over touchdown celebration
item.description: Detroit Lions coach Dan Campbell appeared to call out the NFL for its rules on touchdown celebrations after receiver Jameson Williams was fined for his during the Lions' Week 11 win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Staley counsels some South Carolina fans to keep calm after No. 4 Gamecocks 1st loss in two seasons
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina coach Dawn Staley is not in panic mode, even if some of her famous “Fams” are following the Gamecocks' first loss in two seasons. Sure, South Carolina has only lost twice in its past 87 games.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vucevic and White lead Bulls to 127-108 win over Wizards, losers of 12 straight
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 19 points and grabbed 12 rebounds as the Chicago Bulls eased to a 127-108 victory over the struggling Washington Wizards on Tuesday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucks hold Antetokounmpo out of NBA Cup game at Miami with swelling in left knee
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo, the league's leading scorer this season, was unexpectedly held out of the Milwaukee Bucks' NBA Cup game at the Miami Heat on Tuesday night with swelling in his left knee. He had been expected to play until about an hour before the game.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sergachev scores in overtime in 3-2 Utah HC win
item.description: MONTREAL (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 27 seconds remaining in overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens at Bell Centre on Tuesday. Sergachev directed a Nick Schmaltz pass through the crease inside the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dejounte Murray is rejoining the Pelicans vs. Toronto and drawing inspiration from his mother
item.description: METAIRIE, La. (AP) — Dejounte Murray plans to return to the New Orleans Pelicans ' lineup on Wednesday night for the first time since fracturing his left hand in a season-opening victory over Chicago on Oct. 23.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 10 Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an IHSA state championship in Normal this week
item.description: Ten Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an Illinois High School Association state championship later this week in Normal. That includes two based in the city and two that will play each other for the state title in Class 8A, the IHSA's largest division.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Special teams miscues prove costly for Bears in overtime loss to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Cairo Santos had a field goal blocked — again. DeAndre Carter muffed a punt in the second half. And those were just the special teams mistakes for the struggling Chicago Bears.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against his father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family in Austin has boiled over into a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, WGN 9

item.title: Short-handed 49ers stomped by Packers in 38-10 road loss
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) -- Josh Jacobs rushed for 106 yards and matched a career high with three touchdowns and the Green Bay Packers trounced the short-handed San Francisco 49ers 38-10 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes fined over $14K for 'violent gesture' at Bills game
item.description: The star quarterback celebrated a touchdown pass with a hand gesture that appeared to imitate him holding a gun.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Asked how he planned to celebrate his fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship, Max Verstappen did a quick scan of the room searching for a drop of alcohol. “Well, I ran out of beer, so I don't know,” he said. “Maybe another one, and then maybe I switch to something else.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Scotty Pippen Jr. scores career-high 30 points in Grizzlies' 142-131 win over Bulls
item.description: Scotty Pippen Jr. had a career-best 30 points with 10 assists to lead the Memphis Grizzlies past the Chicago Bulls 142-131 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jets look for coach, GM amid chaos
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – With the Jets’ season completely off the rails, it wasn't a big surprise when General Manager Joe Douglas was fired this week. Changes need to be made, and Douglas was carrying around a 30-64 record over five-plus seasons.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Markkanen scores 34 as Jazz beat Knicks, 121-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Lauri Markkanen had 34 points, Collin Sexton had four 3-pointers in the fourth quarter and the Utah Jazz ran past the New York Knicks 121-106 on Saturday to snap a four-game skid. Sexton finished 25 points and John Collins had 20 points and 13 rebounds forthe Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Florida knocks No. 9 Ole Miss out of College Football Playoff contention, 24-17 in the Swamp
item.description: Coach Billy Napier and his team did something no one at Florida had done in nearly two decades. It could be the turning point for a once-proud program that clearly slipped in recent years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Formula 1 expected to expand grid to 11 teams as early as next week for Cadillac to enter in 2026
item.description: Formula 1 is expected to approve grid expansion for an 11th team originally started by Michael Andretti as early as next week, The Associated Press has learned.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Zach Werenski’s goal in OT and 5-point game helps Blue Jackets to 7-6 win over Lightning
item.description: Zach Werenski’s goal at 1:25 of overtime punctuated a five-point game as the Columbus Blue Jackets rallied from an early three-goal deficit and beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 7-6. Werenski had tied the game at 4 in the second period and added three assists.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Corner Canyon wins back-to-back 6A championships
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Corner Canyon dynasty continues. The Chargers won their second straight 6A state championship, and fourth in the last six years, with a hard-fought 30-27 win over Lone Peak, avenging their lone loss in the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
